messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Profile peak RSS per Stryker worker during a mutation run and recommend a free-RAM-headroom concurrency formula (measure first; the adaptive-sizing implementation is a named follow-up)
What it solves: WHAT / WHY (verified against live config, not memory):
  - extension/stryker.config.json today sets a FIXED "concurrency": 4 — a static
    number, RAM-blind. Each unit of Stryker concurrency is a separate worker
    PROCESS running its own Vitest instance; Stryker's vitest-runner hardcodes
    poo…
How it works: recommendMutationConcurrency floors division of free-RAM headroom by peak per-worker RSS
